product_name: Industrial Edge Common Databus Payload Format
data_coverage_summary: Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. Published specification defines the structure of telemetry payloads on the Industrial Edge databus.
buyer_guidance: Use this specification when the integration needs to understand or validate Industrial Edge databus payloads rather than manage source records.
overview: Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. This artifact is a message-format specification used for telemetry exchange rather than a business CRUD API. Asset data is N/A. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is N/A.

available_data.description: Published specification defines the structure of telemetry payloads on the Industrial Edge databus.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The evidence for this record comes from the published Siemens overview and product summary; the public artifact did not expose a simple path list during generation.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Industrial Edge Common Databus Payload Format.
